inline_comments.message:
We have an alias for 'utils' in Webpack.config ... cleaner and easier to move code around if you use the alias rather than specifying the full exact path.
This applies to many of the other changes made in this CI

not sure you can drop the .jsx extension here... did this compile and run? I've made this change in a side branch but needed to add the following to the webpack config files to allow file references without extensions:

resolve.extensions: ["", ".webpack.js", ".web.js", ".js", ".json", ".jsx"]
